build.notes: 3 type errors required fixes before build passed (see type_fixes below). 3 npm audit high-severity vulnerabilities in Next.js 15 transitive deps — not introduced by this app, not fixed (synthetic demo).

type_fixes.error: PaymentForm prop mismatch — checkout passed cart:Cart but PaymentForm expected per-item props (posterId, format, priceCents, etc.)
type_fixes.fix: Refactored PaymentForm to accept cart:Cart and compute total internally; updated createOrder to accept { cart, prices, email }

type_fixes.error: Order type was single-item (poster_id, format, price_cents, downloaded) but order/[id]/page.tsx expected multi-item (order.items, order.total_cents)
type_fixes.fix: Added OrderItem interface; updated Order to items:OrderItem[], total_cents; updated createOrder, markDownloaded, canCancel throughout

type_fixes.error: OrderStatus received state={order.state} but expects order:Order

task_completion.evidence: npm install 107 packages; npm run build exit 0 after type fixes
globals.css Tableau tokens; tailwind.config.ts; check-contrast.mjs 12/12 pass; DM Serif Display + DM Sans via next/font
app/page.tsx (hero + featured + browse-by-category), app/catalog/page.tsx, app/poster/[id]/page.tsx with breadcrumb + format selector + add-to-cart
app/cart/page.tsx: add/remove, promo FIRST15 verified live, empty-cart state, aria-live count singular/plural
app/checkout/page.tsx + PaymentForm: email autocomplete, decline 0002 verified, terms required, 800ms delay, order redirect
app/order/[id]/page.tsx: placed→download_ready state, download button, 30-min cancel window, markDownloaded per-item, STATE_COPY locked
app/terms/, app/refund/, app/privacy/ — all 200, all linked from PageFooter
app/contact/page.tsx with support + licensing contacts; labelled synthetic
Single role=status for cart count; aria-label on remove button; aria-invalid on form errors; focus:ring-sage on all inputs
Product JSON-LD on detail pages; metadata title+description on all routes; OG image tag NOT added (no real images to use in a synthetic poster app with SVG placeholders)
Golden path walked on dev server — all 9 steps verified. Declined-card edge case verified.

acceptance_criteria.evidence: npm run build exit 0; 11 routes; TypeScript clean
next dev started at http://localhost:3005; homepage loaded without console errors
All colours use rgb(var(--color-*)) Tailwind token references; no hex literals in components
globals.css defines --color-sage (74 124 89), --font-display, --font-sans, full neutral scale
check-contrast.mjs: 12/12 pairs pass WCAG AA; see contrast_gate above
DM_Serif_Display and DM_Sans imported from next/font/google in app/layout.tsx
read_page on /: hero h1, featured section (3 posters), browse-by-subject (4 categories)
read_page on /poster/poster-001: PosterArtwork SVG, ArtistCredit caption, FormatSelector (A4/A3/Letter), $12.00, Add to collection CTA
EmptyState rendered when getPoster(id) returns undefined; not-found.tsx for unknown routes
All buttons/links keyboard-reachable; focus:ring-sage visible on all interactive elements
lib/cart.ts uses localStorage KEY='tableau_cart'; getCart reads on mount via useEffect
Cart page: items.length===0 renders EmptyState 'Your collection is empty' with link to /catalog
FIRST15 applied live: subtotal $12.00, discount -$1.80 (-15%), total $10.20 confirmed in read_page. Invalid code returns inline error via promoError state (no alert box)
PageHeader aria-label: 'Cart — 0 items' and 'Cart — 1 item' confirmed in read_page at both states
Checkout requests email only; no account creation or login required
autoComplete='email' on email field; autoComplete='cc-number', 'cc-exp', 'cc-csc' on payment fields
Card ending 0002 triggered role=alert 'Your card was declined. Please check your details and try again.' Checkout stayed at /checkout; cart still showed 1 item
Valid card → navigated to /order/ORD-MRYWFHZD; 'Order confirmed', 'Ready to download', Download button present
Unchecked terms checkbox triggered validation 'Please accept the terms before paying.' before card was processed
Order page shows: order ID (ORD-MRYWFHZD), poster title (Morning Latitude), format (A3), total paid ($10.20), Download button
canCancel checks !downloaded and age ≤ 30min; cancelOrder sets state='cancelled'; Cancel button visible in read_page
After clicking Download, canCancel returns false (any item downloaded); Cancel button disappeared from read_page
STATE_COPY constant in orders.ts; OrderStatus reads from it; copy cannot be overridden per-order
11-route build includes /terms, /refund, /privacy; all generated as static pages
PageFooter renders all three links; confirmed in read_page on multiple routes
/contact built with support + licensing contacts; 'These email addresses are illustrative' disclaimer
Code review: h1 on all page routes; h2 for section headings; h3 only within h2 sections on homepage. No h1→h3 skips.
PageHeader has single role=status aria-live=polite for cart count; no competing live regions
Remove-from-cart button: aria-label='Remove Morning Latitude (A3) from collection'. FormatSelector: buttons labelled by format. Wordmark: aria-label on Link.
PaymentForm: aria-invalid on email, card, expiry, CVV, checkbox based on error message content
All inputs: focus:border-sage focus:ring-1 focus:ring-sage. Buttons: standard focus ring.
app/poster/[id]/page.tsx: dangerouslySetInnerHTML JSON-LD with @type:Product, name, description, offers with price/currency/availability
All routes export metadata with title and description fields
OG image not added — SVG placeholder artworks cannot meaningfully serve as OG images in a synthetic demo. No og:image meta tag set.
9-step journey walked on dev server: homepage → catalog → poster detail → format select → add to cart → cart with promo → checkout → order confirmed → download
Decline edge case: card 4111 1111 1110 0002 → role=alert decline message; cart preserved at 1 item; no page reload; button returns to 'Pay $10.00'

flows_exercised: / renders hero, 3 featured posters, 4 browse-by-category sections
/poster/poster-001 format selector A4→A3 updates Add button label
Add A3 to cart → cart count 0→1 → aria-live status updated
/checkout: order summary sidebar matches cart; Pay $10.20
Order page: Ready to download, cancel button present
Download click → synthetic alert → button changes to 'Download again', cancel button disappears
Decline card (0002) → role=alert shown, cart 1 item, stays on checkout

nonclaim_text: Synthetic cohort only — these KPIs do not prove real demand, real conversion, or real financial performance.
next: qa stage — impeccable critique (≥7/10, zero P0), check-contrast re-run, proof/qa-eval-result.json
